text.title: ESCAPE TO ICELAND | Cinematic Travel Film
text.u: when you need to feel alive
where do you go when you need to
when was the last time you decided to go
when was the last time you went
you let the wind breathe for you
you let the mountains do the talking
when you need to feel alive
when you need to feel free
where do you go when you need to
hi uh that felt good it felt good to
just kind of get back to my roots and
make a proper cinematic travel film
again i didn't get to make as many as i
would have liked to last year so
just felt nice this video would not have
been made possible without the help of
my friends over at art list they are a
company and a product that i stand
behind a thousand percent i think they
are the best music in the game now is
the perfect time to get an art list
account if you've been thinking of
getting an artlist account why because
you can help me out and why wouldn't you
want to help your friend out use the
link in the description get two months
extra free and you can use music like
the song that i used in this video today
cinematic powerful music that i think
can really help your story so get an
heartless account and maybe i can make a
